directive.title: Neon DB connection and basic table creation

auditor.summary: Build successfully implements Neon PostgreSQL database connection with connection pooling (max 10), DECIMAL(15,4) financial precision, immutable audit logging, and comprehensive schema. Minor issues: type definitions slightly incomplete, SSL validation disabled, and Drizzle integration could better utilize the connection pool. Overall meets directive acceptance criteria with high quality.

top_issues.description: Type definitions do not fully match database schema: missing ip_address (INET type), user_agent fields in AuditLog; missing schema_migrations table type
ssl.rejectUnauthorized: false disables SSL certificate validation, which is a security concern for production database connections
Drizzle initialization uses sql (neon function) but pool is created separately and never used for queries; pool stats are available but pool is not integrated with Drizzle
